title: geum × gonzaloi
intro: Geum × gonzaloi, also known as the Gonzalo's avens, is a hybrid plant species within the geum genus that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids in its roots and rhizomes. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Geum × gonzaloi is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
